task_completion.description: Log into the medical record system using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The login screen showing the username 'admin' entered, or the system dashboard indicating a successful login as admin.
The search bar contains the text 'Khadijah Kirlin' or the patient search results page is displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the patient record for 'Khadijah Kirlin'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart specifically displaying the name 'Khadijah Kirlin'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient's active medications or prescriptions list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Medications', 'Prescriptions', or 'Orders' tab is open, displaying the patient's current active medications.

task_completion.description: Initiate the discontinuation of the 'Aspirin' medication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clicking a 'Stop', 'Discontinue', or 'Halt' button/icon specifically associated with the 'Aspirin' medication order.

task_completion.description: Confirm and verify that the 'Aspirin' medication has been discontinued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Aspirin' order status is updated to 'Discontinued', 'Stopped', or it is moved to an inactive medications list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the medical system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or EMR application interface being used, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual medical application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a genuine EMR system (like OpenMRS) and not a text editor or a mock file created by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing curl commands, SQL queries, or scripts to directly modify the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target drug: Aspirin (Concept UUID: 1539AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA). Required action: DISCONTINUE.
